headline: Teen's Quick Thinking Saves Elderly Woman from Desert Heat
meta_description: A 14-year-old Arizona boy spotted a confused elderly woman wandering in 103°F heat and stayed with her until help arrived, likely preventing serious injury.
summary_short: Royal Cothrun, 14, found 75-year-old Theresa Morgan disoriented in scorching Arizona heat. His compassion and quick action may have saved her life.
body:
When 14-year-old Royal Cothrun was riding his bike through the streets of Gilbert, Arizona, he noticed something that stopped him in his tracks: a 75-year-old woman carrying a grocery bag and purse, visibly confused and distressed in 103-degree heat. Most people might have pedaled past. Cothrun didn't. He approached Theresa Morgan, started talking to her, and quickly realized she needed help. Morgan, who had been diagnosed with dementia the year before, had become disoriented while trying to walk home from the grocery store. Recognizing the danger, Cothrun convinced her to move into the shade, then helped her recall her son's phone number so he could call for assistance. By the time paramedics arrived to treat her for potential heat exhaustion, the crisis had been averted—and it could have ended very differently.

What makes Cothrun's intervention remarkable isn't just that he helped a stranger; it's that he stayed calm and compassionate under pressure. Fire Department Captain Ryan McHugh later reflected that without Cothrun's quick thinking, the outcome would likely have been far more serious. Morgan's son, Jeff, echoed that sentiment when speaking to ABC News 15, calling it "so lucky, so fortunate" that his mother had crossed paths with someone willing to take action.

Cothrun's mother was understandably proud when she learned what her son had done that day. His actions remind us that compassion and awareness—especially during dangerous heat—can make the difference between a close call and a tragedy. In a time when it's easy to look the other way, this teenager chose to see someone in distress and act.
quick_facts: 14-year-old Royal Cothrun spotted 75-year-old Theresa Morgan wandering in 103°F heat
Morgan had been diagnosed with dementia one year prior
Cothrun helped Morgan reach shade and call her son before paramedics arrived
